description: You are an electrical engineering technician preparing a reflected ceiling plan (RCP) for a small office room to coordinate ceiling grid installation with lighting fixture locations. Create a LibreCAD drawing at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/reflected_ceiling_plan.dxf containing a 6000x4800 mm room outline on layer 'ROOM' (Color: White/Index 7) starting at the origin (0,0). The plan must include a ceiling tile grid on layer 'CEILING-GRID' (Color: Gray/Index 8) with vertical lines every 600 mm (X=600 to 5400) and horizontal lines every 600 mm (Y=600 to 4200) spanning the room interior. Additionally, place six 600x600 mm recessed lighting fixtures on layer 'LIGHTING' (Color: Yellow/Index 2) centered at coordinates (1000, 1600), (3000, 1600), (5000, 1600), (1000, 3200), (3000, 3200), and (5000, 3200). Each fixture symbol must consist of a square with two diagonal lines connecting opposite corners to form an 'X'.
